name: Delete Lattice Data
description: Deletes the value at a writable lattice path: w/, o/, n/ (agent scope), or t/ (job temp). Other namespaces are managed via dedicated APIs (g/ via agent_*, s/ via secret_*, j/ via job APIs). Idempotent — deleting a non-existent path is a no-op. Returns {deleted: true}.

path.description: Writable path to delete. Must start with w/, o/, n/, or t/.

deleted.description: True if the delete operation completed successfully
